title: storage — health probes
description: Probes registered with the foundation HealthAggregator. Startup probes gate app boot; readiness probes gate traffic acceptance (K8s readiness endpoint). Critical probes fail app boot when they fail; non-critical probes surface as warnings.

probes.name: storage-registry-hydrated
probes.description: FileKindRegistry compiled from #[FileKind] discovery. Refuses boot when the registry is empty in production (misconfiguration — no attach-able models declared).

probes.name: storage-default-disk-reachable
probes.description: config('storage.default_disk') endpoint is reachable + writable. For S3: HEAD bucket + PutObject with a 1-byte probe file that's immediately deleted. Refuses boot on failure — storage-less operation is a broken state.

probes.name: storage-antivirus-reachable
probes.description: Configured AV driver responds to a health-ping. For ClamAV: PING command over the socket; for hosted: HEAD on the AV service healthcheck endpoint. Critical because a broken AV pipeline is a compliance breach (files that skip scan don't reach `clean` state).

probes.name: storage-cdn-reachable
probes.description: When cdn_delivery is enabled: probe the CDN origin health endpoint. Non-critical because redemptions can fall back to direct S3 URLs during CDN outages.

probes.name: storage-variant-queue-depth
probes.description: GenerateFileVariantsJob queue depth. Warns at > 500 pending, fails at > 5000 (backlog indicates image processor degradation).

probes.name: storage-antivirus-queue-depth
probes.description: ScanFileForVirusesJob queue depth. Warns at > 200 pending, fails at > 2000. Backlog means new uploads take longer to become available.

probes.name: storage-quota-drift
probes.description: Aggregate check: for a sample of 100 tenants, compare SUM(File.size_bytes) against the recorded storage.bytes.consumed entitlement usage. Alerts if any sampled tenant drifts by > 1%. Signals a race in the reconciler.

probes.name: storage-quarantine-review-lag
probes.description: Warns when > 10 files have virus_scan_state='infected' + no admin review in > 24h. Security signal.

probes.name: storage-chunked-upload-stuck
probes.description: Alerts when ChunkedUploads in state=finalizing have lingered > 5 minutes (typical finalize is P95 < 30s). Backlog signal for the FinalizeChunkedUploadController.

probes.name: storage-signature-key-freshness
probes.description: Alerts when the current signed-URL signing key was rotated > config('storage.signing_key_rotation_days', 90) ago. Compliance requirement (SOC 2 CC6.6 key rotation cadence).
